productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Green Solid Shirt
description: CompositionGreen shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, fine stitching - SPI 16 on the shoulders, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, brand tag on the pocket and curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowLine dry inside out in shadeWarm steam iron do not iron on decorationsThis striped shirt from arrow's Sports Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an essential addition to your wardrobe.
